name: Holo UX performance budget
comment: The Holo UX layer's declared, tier-aware performance budget (ADR-028): lean, fast, native-feeling is a number, not a vibe. Resource headroom grows with device capability (lean → standard → rich), but interaction latency stays tight on every tier — responsiveness is non-negotiable. The browser side is MEASURED by Lighthouse (lighthouse-witness.mjs); this file is the DECLARED target, single-sourced and kept consistent with the capability tiers (holo-capability.mjs) by holo-perf-witness.mjs.
authority: Lighthouse (Google) · RAIL model (response < 100ms) · W3C Web Performance
